title: Hiring Store Manager at Berger Silk Store

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Berger Silk Store
jsonLd.description:
We at Berger Silk Store are looking for an experienced Store Manager based out of Visakhapatnam. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Berger Silk Store:
Berger Silk Store is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Berger Silk Store!
